Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Irvine Meadows Amphitheatre
Irvine, CA
Previous Names:
Irvine Meadows Amphitheatre (Changed after 1999)
Verizon Wireless Amphitheater (Changed after 2014)
Seating Capacity: 16085
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 13
  DMB  (13)

Longest Performance:
09.07.13 - Jimi Thing (20:09)
Venue Picture
Description
After 35 years of operation, Irvine Meadows will be torn down after the 2016 concert season, to be replaced by apartment buildings. The last concert at the venue was Gwen Stefani on October 30, 2016.

8808 Irvine Dr.
Irvine, CA 92618
